style: classical fresco plate, muted earth pigment

images.prompt: A raeda carriage leaving a marble city gate at dawn, mounted guard alongside, cypress-lined road climbing north; fresco plate.
A Gallo-Roman town at a river confluence, forum and aqueduct, an imperial carriage changing teams at a mansio; fresco plate.
A Roman harbour with a lighthouse and a low war-galley at the quay, oarsmen boarding, cold northern light; fresco plate.
A timber-and-stone provincial town on a broad tidal river with a wooden bridge and merchant barges; fresco plate.
A legionary fortress of stone ramparts on a river bend, standards and men on parade in the courtyard; fresco plate.
A wall of dressed stone marching over bleak northern hills, a fort beside it, an emperor in a cloak surveying the line; fresco plate.
